title: clematis lishanensis
intro: Clematis lishanensis, also known as Clematis lishanensis, is a plant species in the Ranunculaceae family, characterized by its fragrant flowers and edible parts. Traditionally, the plant has been used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Clematis lishanensis include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in digestion. In herbal preparations, the plant's stems, leaves, and flowers can be dried and made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
